name: 24" Litchfield X-Back Counter Height Barstool with Footrest - Threshold™
description:
Give your kitchen island a comfy update with the Litchfield X-Back Counter Stool from Threshold™. Featuring a solid, hardwood construction, this pretty counter stool comes with an X-back design and metal rivets, adding a warm, rustic appeal to your breakfast nook. The rounded edges on the backrest and seat add a homey vibe to your space. All-round built-in footrests come at just the right height to rest your feet. Place anywhere as an extra seating option or line up three or four coordinating pieces behind your counter or bar for stylish flair.

Overall height: 40 inches
Overall depth**: 21-1/2 inches
**(measure from front edge to back edge, place seating against vertical wall,
measure front edge to wall)
Overall width: 18 inches
Seat depth: 16-1/2 inches
Seat width: 16-3/4 inches
Distance from top seat to floor: 24 inches
Distance from bottom apron to floor: 21-1/2 inches
Distance top of seat at center back to top of upper back: 16 inches
Distance from under stretcher to floor: 5-1/2 inches
